requirement_topic.en: OCPP / Network Interoperability and IEC 61000 EMC Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP / 网络互操作及IEC 61000 EMC证据
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP / 網絡互操作及IEC 61000 EMC證據

summary.en: Nicaragua's EV charging market is still nascent, so an official national charging-network back-office protocol requirement could not be confirmed from official sources. For networked chargers, project owners and charge-point operators may still require OCPP interoperability, remote monitoring, metering exports, fault reporting, and load-management features. EMC and power-quality evidence should be prepared against IEC 61000-family standards, especially for equipment connected to utility distribution networks or larger sites.
summary.zh: 尼加拉瓜电动汽车充电市场仍处于早期阶段，未能从官方来源确认全国统一充电网络后台协议要求。对于联网充电桩，项目业主和充电点运营商仍可能要求OCPP互操作、远程监控、计量导出、故障报告和负载管理功能。EMC和电能质量证据应按IEC 61000系列标准准备，尤其适用于接入公用配电网络或较大型站点的设备。
summary.zht: 尼加拉瓜電動汽車充電市場仍處於早期階段，未能從官方來源確認全國統一充電網絡後台協議要求。對於聯網充電樁，項目業主和充電點運營商仍可能要求OCPP互操作、遠程監控、計量導出、故障報告和負載管理功能。EMC和電能質量證據應按IEC 61000系列標準準備，尤其適用於接入公用配電網絡或較大型站點的設備。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — back-office communication for networked chargers where specified
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1:2017 — control pilot and conductive charging safety context
Utility or charge-point-operator commissioning and data-integration requirements

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 between the off-board charger and the battery management system. China chargers may also include operator-specific cloud protocols. GB/T 27930 is not an OCPP back-office protocol, and China-market EMC reports may not cover the IEC 61000 test levels, mains frequency, immunity, harmonic, flicker, or documentation expectations needed for a Nicaragua utility or project owner.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常在非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间采用GB/T 27930-2023。中国充电桩也可能包含运营商特定云协议。GB/T 27930不是OCPP后台协议，中国市场EMC报告也未必覆盖尼加拉瓜公用事业单位或项目业主需要的IEC 61000试验等级、电网频率、抗扰度、谐波、闪变或文件要求。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常在非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間採用GB/T 27930-2023。中國充電樁也可能包含運營商特定雲協議。GB/T 27930不是OCPP後台協議，中國市場EMC報告也未必覆蓋尼加拉瓜公用事業單位或項目業主需要的IEC 61000試驗等級、電網頻率、抗擾度、諧波、閃變或文件要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
China domestic EMC test reports for EVSE

gap.en: For Nicaragua projects, exporters should confirm whether the buyer requires OCPP 1.6J, OCPP 2.0.1, a proprietary platform, or offline operation. They should also provide IEC 61000 EMC reports, harmonic and flicker data, surge and EFT immunity evidence, 60 Hz test conditions or engineering justification, cybersecurity and SIM/Ethernet/Wi-Fi configuration notes, and commissioning records. A charger that only supports GB/T 27930 vehicle communication and a China-only cloud API may fail network and EMC acceptance.
gap.zh: 对于尼加拉瓜项目，出口商应确认买方是否要求OCPP 1.6J、OCPP 2.0.1、专有平台或离线运行。同时应提供IEC 61000 EMC报告、谐波和闪变数据、浪涌及EFT抗扰度证据、60 Hz测试条件或工程论证、网络安全及SIM/以太网/Wi-Fi配置说明，以及调试记录。仅支持GB/T 27930车辆通信和中国专用云API的充电桩，可能无法通过网络和EMC验收。
gap.zht: 對於尼加拉瓜項目，出口商應確認買方是否要求OCPP 1.6J、OCPP 2.0.1、專有平台或離線運行。同時應提供IEC 61000 EMC報告、諧波和閃變數據、浪湧及EFT抗擾度證據、60 Hz測試條件或工程論證、網絡安全及SIM/以太網/Wi-Fi配置說明，以及調試記錄。僅支持GB/T 27930車輛通訊和中國專用雲API的充電樁，可能無法通過網絡和EMC驗收。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent — OCPP is mandatory only where specified by the buyer, CPO, or public network; IEC 61000-family EMC evidence is the conservative technical baseline for utility-connected electrical equipment
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is China domestic DC vehicle communication and is not an OCPP or IEC 61000 EMC substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Confirm the Nicaragua project's back-office requirement instead of assuming a national OCPP mandate. Prepare IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality evidence, and do not treat GB/T 27930 or a China-only cloud API as network interoperability proof.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应确认尼加拉瓜具体项目后台要求，而非假设存在全国OCPP强制规则。应准备IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量证据，不应将GB/T 27930或中国专用云API视为网络互操作证明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應確認尼加拉瓜具體項目後台要求，而非假設存在全國OCPP強制規則。應準備IEC 61000 EMC和電能質量證據，不應將GB/T 27930或中國專用雲API視為網絡互操作證明。
